'''鈭歮-dh-t''' ('''madhata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babble|babble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babble|babble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-dh-t
|-
! Lemma
| madhata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:madhatithi|madhatithi]] || [[word:madhatiji|madhatiji]] || [[word:madhatishi|madhatishi]] || [[word:madhati|madhati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhatuthuth|madhatuthuth]] || [[word:madhatujuj|madhatujuj]] || [[word:madhatushush|madhatushush]] || [[word:madhat|madhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhatuthu|madhatuthu]] || [[word:madhatuju|madhatuju]] || [[word:madhatushu|madhatushu]] || [[word:madhatu|madhatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhatufuth|madhatufuth]] || [[word:madhatufuj|madhatufuj]] || [[word:madhatufush|madhatufush]] || [[word:madhatuf|madhatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:madhatethe|madhatethe]] || [[word:madhateje|madhateje]] || [[word:madhateshe|madhateshe]] || [[word:madhate|madhate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhatothoth|madhatothoth]] || [[word:madhatojoj|madhatojoj]] || [[word:madhatoshosh|madhatoshosh]] || [[word:madhat|madhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhatotho|madhatotho]] || [[word:madhatojo|madhatojo]] || [[word:madhatosho|madhatosho]] || [[word:madhato|madhato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhatofoth|madhatofoth]] || [[word:madhatofoj|madhatofoj]] || [[word:madhatofosh|madhatofosh]] || [[word:madhatof|madhatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:madhat忙th忙|madhat忙th忙]] || [[word:madhat忙j忙|madhat忙j忙]] || [[word:madhat忙sh忙|madhat忙sh忙]] || [[word:madhat忙|madhat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhatathath|madhatathath]] || [[word:madhatajaj|madhatajaj]] || [[word:madhatashash|madhatashash]] || [[word:madhat|madhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhatatha|madhatatha]] || [[word:madhataja|madhataja]] || [[word:madhatasha|madhatasha]] || [[word:madhata|madhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhatafath|madhatafath]] || [[word:madhatafaj|madhatafaj]] || [[word:madhatafash|madhatafash]] || [[word:madhataf|madhataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:madhatasha|madhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomadhatasha|gomadhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimadhatasha|gokimadhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:madhatn眉sha|madhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomadhatnkn眉sha|gomadhatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimadhatn眉sha|gokimadhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:madhatsh毛sha|madhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomadhatnksh毛sha|gomadhatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimadhatsh毛sha|gokimadhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:madhatrosha|madhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadhatnkrosha|gomadhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadhatrosha|gokimadhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:madhatmusha|madhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadhatnkmusha|gomadhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadhatmusha|gokimadhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:madhatsherasha|madhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomadhatnksherasha|gomadhatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimadhatsherasha|gokimadhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:madhatngasha|madhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomadhatnkngasha|gomadhatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimadhatngasha|gokimadhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:madhatyasha|madhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomadhatnkyasha|gomadhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimadhatyasha|gokimadhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:madhatyamasha|madhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomadhatnkyamasha|gomadhatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimadhatyamasha|gokimadhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:madhatn眉sh毛sha|madhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadhatnkn眉sh毛sha|gomadhatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadhatn眉sh毛sha|gokimadhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madhatn眉rosha|madhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadhatnkn眉rosha|gomadhatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadhatn眉rosha|gokimadhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madhatn眉musha|madhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadhatnkn眉musha|gomadhatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadhatn眉musha|gokimadhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:madhatsh毛n眉sha|madhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadhatnksh毛n眉sha|gomadhatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadhatsh毛n眉sha|gokimadhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madhatsh毛rosha|madhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadhatnksh毛rosha|gomadhatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadhatsh毛rosha|gokimadhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madhatsh毛musha|madhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadhatnksh毛musha|gomadhatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadhatsh毛musha|gokimadhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:madhatron眉sha|madhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadhatnkron眉sha|gomadhatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadhatron眉sha|gokimadhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:madhatrosh毛sha|madhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadhatnkrosh毛sha|gomadhatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadhatrosh毛sha|gokimadhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madhatromusha|madhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadhatnkromusha|gomadhatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadhatromusha|gokimadhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:madhatmun眉sha|madhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadhatnkmun眉sha|gomadhatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadhatmun眉sha|gokimadhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:madhatmush毛sha|madhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadhatnkmush毛sha|gomadhatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadhatmush毛sha|gokimadhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madhatmurosha|madhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadhatnkmurosha|gomadhatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadhatmurosha|gokimadhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:madhat|madhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙dh忙t|m忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homadhat|homadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙dh忙t|hom忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomadhat|hohomadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙dh忙t|hohom忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉madhat|n眉madhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙dh忙t|n眉m忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉madhat|n眉n眉madhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙dh忙t|n眉n眉m忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂madhat|n茂madhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙dh忙t|n茂m忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂madhat|n茂n茂madhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙dh忙t|n茂n茂m忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumadhat|lumadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙dh忙t|lum忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumadhat|lulumadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙dh忙t|lulum忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limadhat|limadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙dh忙t|lim忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimadhat|lilimadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙dh忙t|lilim忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komadhat|komadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙dh忙t|kom忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomadhat|kokomadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙dh忙t|kokom忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemadhat|kemadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙dh忙t|kem忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemadhat|kekemadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙dh忙t|kekem忙dh忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
